'''fongahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:waggily|waggily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waggily|waggily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fongahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongahithi|fongahithi]] || [[word:fongahiji|fongahiji]] || [[word:fongahishi|fongahishi]] || [[word:fongahiki|fongahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongahuthuthu|fongahuthuthu]] || [[word:fongahujuju|fongahujuju]] || [[word:fongahushushu|fongahushushu]] || [[word:fongahukuku|fongahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongahuthu|fongahuthu]] || [[word:fongahuju|fongahuju]] || [[word:fongahushu|fongahushu]] || [[word:fongahuku|fongahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongahufthuf|fongahufthuf]] || [[word:fongahufjuf|fongahufjuf]] || [[word:fongahufshuf|fongahufshuf]] || [[word:fongahufkuf|fongahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongahethe|fongahethe]] || [[word:fongaheje|fongaheje]] || [[word:fongaheshe|fongaheshe]] || [[word:fongaheke|fongaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongahothotho|fongahothotho]] || [[word:fongahojojo|fongahojojo]] || [[word:fongahoshosho|fongahoshosho]] || [[word:fongahokoko|fongahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongahotho|fongahotho]] || [[word:fongahojo|fongahojo]] || [[word:fongahosho|fongahosho]] || [[word:fongahoko|fongahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongahofthof|fongahofthof]] || [[word:fongahofjof|fongahofjof]] || [[word:fongahofshof|fongahofshof]] || [[word:fongahofkof|fongahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongahïfthïf|fongahïfthïf]] || [[word:fongahïfjïf|fongahïfjïf]] || [[word:fongahïfshïf|fongahïfshïf]] || [[word:fongahïfkïf|fongahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongahïfthïfthïf|fongahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fongahïfjïfjïf|fongahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fongahïfshïfshïf|fongahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fongahïfkïfkïf|fongahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongahïfthïf|fongahïfthïf]] || [[word:fongahïfjïf|fongahïfjïf]] || [[word:fongahïfshïf|fongahïfshïf]] || [[word:fongahïfkïf|fongahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongahïfthïf|fongahïfthïf]] || [[word:fongahïfjïf|fongahïfjïf]] || [[word:fongahïfshïf|fongahïfshïf]] || [[word:fongahïfkïf|fongahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongahæthæ|fongahæthæ]] || [[word:fongahæjæ|fongahæjæ]] || [[word:fongahæshæ|fongahæshæ]] || [[word:fongahækæ|fongahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongahathatha|fongahathatha]] || [[word:fongahajaja|fongahajaja]] || [[word:fongahashasha|fongahashasha]] || [[word:fongahakaka|fongahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongahatha|fongahatha]] || [[word:fongahaja|fongahaja]] || [[word:fongahasha|fongahasha]] || [[word:fongahaka|fongahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongahafthaf|fongahafthaf]] || [[word:fongahafjaf|fongahafjaf]] || [[word:fongahafshaf|fongahafshaf]] || [[word:fongahafkaf|fongahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fongahasha|fongahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongahshësha|fongahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongahrosha|fongahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongahmusha|fongahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongahyasha|fongahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongahnkshësha|gofongahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongahnkrosha|gofongahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongahnkmusha|gofongahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongahnkyasha|gofongahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fongangahasha|fongangahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongangahshësha|fongangahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongangahrosha|fongangahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongangahmusha|fongangahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongangahyasha|fongangahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongangahnkshësha|gofongangahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongangahnkrosha|gofongangahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongangahnkmusha|gofongangahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongangahnkyasha|gofongangahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fengæhasha|fengæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fengæhshësha|fengæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fengæhrosha|fengæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fengæhmusha|fengæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fengæhyasha|fengæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofengæhnkshësha|gofengæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofengæhnkrosha|gofengæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofengæhnkmusha|gofengæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofengæhnkyasha|gofengæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fongfahasha|fongfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongfahshësha|fongfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongfahrosha|fongfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongfahmusha|fongfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongfahyasha|fongfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongfahnkshësha|gofongfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongfahnkrosha|gofongfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongfahnkmusha|gofongfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongfahnkyasha|gofongfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
